Title: Values & National Identity
description: Three interlocking programmes embedding UAE values in daily school life, transforming how Arabic is taught, and deepening Emirati students sense of identity.

Title: Health, Wellbeing & Bullying Reform
description: New competitive sports leagues across Abu Dhabi private schools alongside a comprehensive overhaul of how schools detect, log, and escalate bullying.

Title: Future-Ready Workforce
description: AI literacy embedded across all curricula, pilot AI schools, AI-assisted teaching tools, and a review of all university programmes in Abu Dhabi for labour market alignment.

Title: Livability & Value for Money
description: Making Abu Dhabi private schools worth the fees families pay through targeted policy reform and investor attraction so families choose to study here rather than abroad.
